consumes.artifact: specs/<spec-id>/spec.xml (follow source pointer to design doc)

requirement.title: Delta Discovery via Source Pointer
requirement.description: Planner MUST read delta information by following the spec's source pointer to the design doc, then reading its REFINER_INPUT section.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given a spec.xml with source/design_path pointing to docs/plans/my-feature/2026-04-16/design.md, planner MUST read that file's REFINER_INPUT to determine type (initial vs iteration) and delta content. REQ-F016
Planner MUST NOT infer delta information from spec.xml diff or git history. The design doc's REFINER_INPUT is the sole delta source. REQ-F016

requirement.title: Initial/Replace Mode — Build From Scratch
requirement.description: When REFINER_INPUT type is "initial" or type is "iteration" with no Delta section (replace), planner MUST build dag.yaml and epics/ from scratch.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given a spec.xml v1 (initial), planner MUST produce a dag.yaml with all epics in "pending" status and source_spec_version: 1. REQ-F017
Given a replace-mode spec.xml v3 (iteration, no delta), planner MUST rebuild the entire dag.yaml. Pre-existing epic statuses from the previous DAG MUST NOT carry over. REQ-F017
For each epic in dag.yaml, planner MUST produce an epics/<epic-id>/epic.md with at minimum: title, description, and feature breakdown. REQ-F017

requirement.title: Iteration Mode — Delta Processing Matrix
requirement.description: When REFINER_INPUT type is "iteration" with a Delta section, planner MUST apply changes to the existing dag.yaml according to the delta-by-epic-status matrix.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: ADDED requirements MUST result in new epics with status: pending and source_spec_version: N (current spec version). REQ-F018
MODIFIED requirements where the affected epic is "completed" MUST result in a new rework epic with status: pending and rework_of pointing to the original epic id. REQ-F018
REMOVED requirements where the affected epic is "pending" MUST result in the epic being removed from dag.yaml entirely. REQ-F018
MODIFIED requirements where the affected epic is "pending" MUST update the existing epic in place (no rework epic needed). REQ-F018

requirement.title: Block on In-Progress Conflicts
requirement.description: When MODIFIED or REMOVED delta affects an epic with status "in_progress", planner MUST block and produce a diff report. Human decides resolution.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given a MODIFIED requirement and an in_progress epic implementing it, planner MUST NOT auto-apply the change. It MUST produce a diff report presenting three options: (1) complete first then rework, (2) abort and create rework epic, (3) merge changes into current work. REQ-F019
Given a REMOVED requirement and an in_progress epic implementing it, planner MUST NOT auto-remove the epic. It MUST produce a diff report and wait for human decision. REQ-F019
Auto-applied changes (ADDED epics, REMOVED pending epics, MODIFIED completed epics) MUST be listed in the report's "Auto-applied" section for user awareness, even when no blocking occurs. REQ-F019

requirement.title: Source Spec Version Tagging
requirement.description: Every epic MUST carry a source_spec_version field indicating which spec version introduced or last modified it.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: New epics created during spec v2 planning MUST have source_spec_version: 2. REQ-F020
Unchanged epics from a previous version MUST retain their original source_spec_version value. REQ-F020
Rework epics MUST have source_spec_version set to the version that triggered the rework, not the original version. REQ-F020

requirement.title: Rework Epic Tracking
requirement.description: Rework epics MUST include a rework_of field referencing the original epic id, providing a traceable chain from modification to source.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given epic "capability-a" (completed, v1) modified in v2, the rework epic MUST be named "capability-a-v2" with rework_of: capability-a. REQ-F021
The original epic's status MUST NOT be changed by the creation of a rework epic. It remains "completed". REQ-F021

requirement.title: Self-Contained Project Unit
requirement.description: DAG and epics MUST live inside the spec folder. Each spec/<spec-id>/ is a self-contained project unit with all artifacts needed for execution.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: dag.yaml MUST be written to specs/<spec-id>/dag.yaml, not to the project root or any other location. REQ-F022
Epic folders MUST be at specs/<spec-id>/epics/<epic-id>/. REQ-F022
No dag.yaml field MUST reference paths outside of specs/<spec-id>/ except for the source pointer back to the design doc. REQ-F022

requirement.title: Done Signal
requirement.description: An iteration is considered "done" when all epics with a given source_spec_version are in "completed" status.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given 3 epics with source_spec_version: 2 and all 3 in "completed" status, iteration v2 MUST be considered done. REQ-F023
Given 3 epics with source_spec_version: 2 and 1 still "pending", iteration v2 MUST NOT be considered done. REQ-F023
Epics from previous versions (source_spec_version: 1) MUST NOT affect the done signal for version 2. REQ-F023
